---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a teaching addition
title: '[feature] '
labels: enhancement
---

**What teaching gap would this fill**
e.g. "the inline-edit pattern only covers a single numeric field — a
multi-field edit dialog would show how react-hook-form scales".

**Sketch**
A few sentences on what code would change. Files, hooks, components.

**Why this fits the repo's scope**
Reminder: the repo is one app, one user story, with the rule that
each phase ends in a runnable state and doesn't bring in dependencies
that don't earn their teaching keep. Why does this addition pass that
test?

**Alternatives considered**
A "do nothing" or "document only" alternative is always valid.
